segments.text: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He cuts off every one of my branches that doesn't bear fruit. He prunes every branch that bears fruit so it can bear even more.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You are already pruned and made clean through what I've told you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remain in me, and I will remain in you.  Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it remains part of the vine, so it is for you: you cannot bear fruit unless you remain in me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I'm the vine, you're the branches. Those who remain in me, and I in them, will produce plenty of fruit—for apart from me you can't do anything.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Anyone who doesn't remain in me is like a branch that is thrown out and dries up. Such branches are gathered together, thrown into the fire and burned.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you remain in me, and my words remain in you, then you can ask for whatever you want, and it will be given you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: My Father is glorified as you produce plenty of fruit, proving you are my disciples.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As the Father loved me, so I have loved you. Remain in my love.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you do what I say, you will remain in my love, just as I do what my Father says and remain in his love.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I've explained this to you so that my joy may be in you and that your joy may be complete.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: This is my command: love one another as I have loved you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: There is no greater love than to give your life for your friends.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You're my friends if you do what I tell you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I don't call you servants any longer, for servants are not taken into their master's confidence.  I call you friends, for everything my Father told me I've explained to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You didn't choose me, I chose you. I have given you the responsibility to go and produce lasting fruit. So the Father will give you whatever you ask in my name.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: This is my command to you: love one another.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the world hates you, remember that it hated me before it hated you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you were part of this world, it would love you as its own. But you're not part of the world, and I chose you out of the world—that's why the world hates you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember what I told you: servants aren't more important than their master. If they persecuted me, they will persecute you too. If they did what I told them, they would do what you tell them too.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But everything they do to you will be because of me, for they don't know the one who sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If I hadn't come and spoken to them, they wouldn't be guilty of sin—but now they have no excuse for their sin.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Anyone who hates me hates my Father as well.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If I had not given them such a demonstration through things that no one had ever done before, they wouldn't be guilty of sin, but despite seeing all this they hated both me and my Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But this just fulfilled what Scripture says, ‘They hated me for no reason at all.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But I will send you the Comforter from the Father. When he comes, he will give evidence about me. He is the Spirit of truth who comes from the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will also give evidence about me because you were with me from the beginning.
segments.speaker: Jesus
